message:
fix(clippy): resolve manual_let_else, needless_borrow, match_same_arms warnings

- lib.rs: Remove unnecessary & before output.trim() in from_str call
- main.rs: Use let...else for expected parse failure in test
- main.rs: Merge PortStatus::Free and PortStatus::Error arms
